title: MaralGPT "Mythos" 9B just released, and this is why I'm proud of my project
abstract: MaralGPT "Mythos" 9B has just been released, and I'm beaming with pride! Imagine a giant language model ready to co-create myths with you—pretty cool, right? It's like having a wise giant standing atop the mountain of knowledge, waiting for us to explore. Revealing this secret tool, does it make your world feel a bit more magical? Give it a try!
abstract_zh: MaralGPT "Mythos" 9B 刚刚发布，这可是我的心头好！想象一下，一个能和你一起编织神话故事的超大模型，多酷啊！它就像是个智慧的巨人，站在知识的高山之巅，等着我们去探索。我为你揭晓这个秘密武器，是不是觉得自己的世界瞬间变得不一样了？快来体验吧！
